description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a perimeter fence and lush greenery, featuring a large, low-pitched gable roof with dark shingles. The front facade includes a driveway with a blue car parked in front of a double garage, and a paved entryway leading to the main entrance. The structure is primarily composed of dark exterior walls with large windows, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The backyard and sides are lined with dense trees, offering privacy and a natural aesthetic. The rear of the bungalow is plain, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing the focus on the front and side elevations. The property is set within a neatly maintained lawn, bordered by a modern fence.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, large windows, and a double garage, surrounded by trees and a perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, blue car, double garage, main entrance, and front lawn with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense tree line, side lawn, and the expanse of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with no windows or doors, flanked by trees and the perimeter fence.
description_view_3: Back-side view showing the rear lawn, dense trees, and a partial view of the driveway and car.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
